no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction explicitly states the exact CSS rule ('&:first-child' selector applying 'marginInlineEnd: token.marginSM') which is verbatim what the test regex searches for, leaving no reasoning about what to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept any regex match of the '&:first-child' pattern with marginInlineEnd and any 'title &&' conditional, allowing reasonable alternative implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Beyond text regex checks, tests invoke npm test, jest suites, eslint, and biome to verify behavior and code quality.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2P tests require specific code changes plus the full existing test suite to continue passing, which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both requirements (conditional title, first-child marginInlineEnd) and 'existing tests still pass' are covered by the test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings labeling FAIL-TO-PASS vs PASS-TO-PASS, and clear grouping.
